allow: Bash(curl -s -X POST http://127.0.0.1:8787/query -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"sql": "SELECT table_schema, table_name, column_name, data_type, is_nullable FROM information_schema.columns WHERE table_schema NOT IN \('\\''pg_catalog'\\'', '\\''information_schema'\\''\) ORDER BY table_schema, table_name, ordinal_position", "database": "HPCData"}')
